name: chat2skill
description: Automatically learn reusable skills from coding-agent conversations, retrieve them for future sessions, enforce learned hard response constraints, and review completion against the original request.

interface.shortDescription: Learn and retrieve skills from your daily agent conversations.
interface.longDescription: Chat2Skill captures conversations after each session, sends them to the Chat2Skill cloud extraction API (using your own LLM api key), stores the learned skills locally under ~/.chat2skill, injects relevant project summaries and detailed skills into new conversations, and uses Stop hooks to enforce learned hard wording constraints and reconcile completion claims against the original request before a turn ends.
defaultPrompt: Use Chat2Skill to retrieve relevant learned skills for this task.
Update Chat2Skill from the latest session.
Show me where Chat2Skill stored my generated skills.
